data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the age restriction requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the age restriction for certain services, specifically that users must be 21 or older. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the age of the users involved in the booking process. The linked use case mentions age restrictions but lacks concrete evidence to confirm that this requirement was satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the age of users booking services.
